{{Quote|As for a zero percentage probability that you survive this encounter, I see no risk of informing you that I have tracked my esteem competitor to the Zhar system, where he will soon lose Captain Solo to me.|[[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88]], to [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] previous to their fight in [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]|<ref name="SOTEVG">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]</ref>}}
The '''Zhar system''', located in the [[Cadavine sector/Legends|Cadavine sector]], was home to the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Zhar/Legends|Zhar]] and [[Taivas]]. The latter was the secret location of the [[Hidden Temple (Sith–Imperial War)|Hidden Temple]].

In addition, it was also home to Imperial [[Outpost 327]], the platform that at one time housed the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class shuttle]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']].

The moon of [[Gall/Legends|Gall]] was also located in the Zhar system.

==Behind the scenes==
In February [[2010]], the '''Taivas system''' was removed from [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]].<ref name="TEAOCarchiveonly">https://web.archive.org/web/20090908180706/http://www.starwars.com/atlas/index.html?page=5 {{1stID|Taivas system}}</ref>
